title: Soulection White Label: 007
content: These past couple of months have been non-stop day in and day out. We've been traveling and spreading the sound of tomorrow. Here we are with some down time and really excited to present you our 7th White Label by a group of 4 talented guys from Gent, Belgium. They caught our attention after they dropped XXXX. When we heard it, we thought it was Carmack, but then we looked and realized it was these talented guys! They have a very versatile sound that will only make you feel it in your chest. Keep your ears and eyes open, these guys got next.
